description: Tiles are generated from randomized geometry: trunk curves, branches, canopy lobes, apple positions, decoy props, occluders, palettes, tilt, crop, and grain. No raster image files are used.
challenge_randomization: The server regenerates the current challenge on each /state request and after failed submissions. Explicit seeds remain only as a developer debugging hook.
notes: The public browser state contains render geometry only. Hidden ground truth records which generated tile ids satisfy the prompt.
